description: Configurable allocation rules per attendee tier. Managed via admin Code App's visual rules editor.

columns.description: JSON string conforming to AllocationRuleSchema TypeScript type. Written by the admin Code App, read by the context-loading Power Automate flow. Schema contract: { tierName, eventType, packItems: [{ itemId, itemName, sizeCategory, quantity, unitCost }], totalPackCost }

uniqueConstraint.description: One rule per tier per event type
